content:
# Session 4 (iter-004) — recommendations for next plan iter

## Do NOT re-assign (blocked / deferred — standing directives)
- **χ chain in `QuotScheme.lean`** — `hilbertPolynomial`, `QuotFunctor`, and the `QuotFunctor`-dependent
  `Grassmannian` functor + `representable` skeleton. χ-semantic (`Φ(m)=χ=Σᵢ(-1)ⁱ dim Hⁱ`); needs higher
  cohomology this i=0 leg lacks. Fill from the cohomology leg at merge-back. **NEW this iter:** the
  directive's "`representable` is χ-free-closable here" was tested against the Lean and is FALSE
  as-encoded (whole chain bottoms out in the `hilbertPolynomial` sorry). A χ-free re-encode here would
  diverge from the merge-shared decl → merge conflict. Do NOT re-probe; recorded in ARCHON_MEMORY.
- **SNAP `SectionGradedRing.lean` (11 sorries)** — deferred to sibling `FBC-B_SNAP-chain`. Re-checked:
  sibling still 9 sorries (NOT finished), 844-line divergence. Import NOT actionable. Do NOT naively
  retry the import; merge-back owns three-way reconciliation.

## No closable in-leg work remains
GR-quot deliverable CLOSED (iter-001): `GrassmannianQuot.lean` sorry-free; goal seed
`Grassmannian.represents` sorry-free + axiom-clean (`[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`).
Continue the mechanical no-prover skip — it is the designed behavior on a terminal merge-pending leg.

## Reverse signals that would change this
- A `USER_HINTS.md` directive to import finished sibling SNAP proofs (only once the sibling's
  `SectionGradedRing.lean` actually reaches 0 sorries — currently 9).
- Merge-back of this cone into the parent's full chapter set (resolves all doctor findings + 326
  unmatched + the χ/SNAP deferrals at once).

## Structural debt — DEFERRED to merge-back (do NOT edit in-leg)
Blueprint-doctor (`logs/iter-004/blueprint-doctor.md`) findings are stable across iter-001..004 and
all target labels/files OUTSIDE the extracted 3-seed cone (verified iter-002 via extract-manifest.json):
- `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex`: 2 phantom `% archon:covers` + 14 broken `\ref` (dropped FBC leg).
- `Picard_GlueDescent.tex` 4; `Picard_QuotScheme.tex` 13; `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex` 7 broken refs.
- 326 `dag-query unmatched` parent-inherited helpers.
Editing these here corrupts the byte-identical-to-parent+sibling three-way merge. Leave for merge-back.

## Reusable proof patterns
No new patterns this iter (no prover work). Existing patterns stand in PROJECT_STATUS Knowledge Base
(post-`rw` diamond `X=X` → explicit `rfl`; `epi_comp'` over `epi_comp` under the value-`ModuleCat`
diamond).
